name: Meatloaf with Poblanos
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Old bread soaked in milk
recipeInstructions:
Bread: Soak a piece of bread in a dish with milk for about an hour. Grind the bread and mix it with the amount of milk needed to form a paste.
Poblanos: Peel and devein the Poblanos peppers, then fry them in a small amount of vegetable oil.
Hard-boiled eggs: Cut into cubes.
Meat: Combine the bread mixture with ground beef, spices (black pepper, salt, dried oregano, dried bay leaves, and paprika), and one egg. Divide into two portions. Place half in a loaf pan, add slices of Poblanos peppers, nuts, and cubed hard-boiled eggs on top, then cover with the remaining mixture. Bake in an oven.
